metadata.title: Portfolio
metadata.description: Software Engineer Portfolio — Next.js App Router + Contentful.

about.bio: I'm a frontend engineer who treats the browser — and the device — like an instrument. Over the last 5+ years I've shipped enterprise applications across web, hybrid mobile and native Android, and learned that performance, accessibility and craft are the same problem wearing different hats.

contact.title: Let's build something together.
contact.intro: Open to frontend web, hybrid mobile, Android and full-stack roles, freelance, and the odd side quest. Replies within a day.
contact.successMessage: Thanks — your enquiry just landed in my inbox. I'll get back to you within a day.
